title: Pentacalia cubensis
taxonomy: Pentacalia cubensis is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The genus Pentacalia is a group of flowering plants that are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. Pentacalia cubensis is a specific species within this genus and is likely to be classified as a shrubby or herbaceous plant. The classification of Pentacalia cubensis is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis.
uses: Pentacalia cubensis, a plant species found in Cuba, has been reported to have various medicinal uses. The plant's extracts have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
